title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 492.120 - Commission, how issued, to whom directed
text:
492.120.  Commission, how issued, to whom directed. — The commission shall be under the seal of the court, and shall be directed to any officer herein authorized to take depositions within the government where the witness may be found.
(RSMo 1939 § 1921) 
Prior revisions: 1929 § 1757; 1919 § 5444; 1909 § 6388
